verses.text: At the temple gate God bids Jeremiah warn, 'Trust ye not in lying words, saying, The temple of the LORD... are these.' Ritual is no shield. To rely on holy buildings while living in sin is a fatal delusion.

At the temple gate God bids Jeremiah warn, 'Trust ye not in lying words, saying, The temple of the LORD... are these.' Ritual is no shield. To rely on holy buildings while living in sin is a fatal delusion.

If they truly amend, doing justice and not oppressing the stranger, orphan, and widow, God will let them dwell in the land. Obedience is the condition. The land is kept not by the temple but by righteous living.

If they truly amend, doing justice and not oppressing the stranger, orphan, and widow, God will let them dwell in the land. Obedience is the condition. The land is kept not by the temple but by righteous living.

If they truly amend, doing justice and not oppressing the stranger, orphan, and widow, God will let them dwell in the land. Obedience is the condition. The land is kept not by the temple but by righteous living.

But they steal, murder, commit adultery, then stand in God's house; 'is this house... become a den of robbers?' Jesus quoted this when cleansing the temple. To sin freely and hide behind worship turns God's house into a robbers' cave.

Let them go to Shiloh, where God first set His name and then destroyed it; so He will cast them out. Past judgment warns. No sacred site is safe for a people who forsake the God who dwells there.

God forbids Jeremiah to pray for them, for whole families serve 'the queen of heaven' and provoke Him. Their idolatry is open and shared. Sin so settled that even intercession is refused is sin near its ripeness.

God did not chiefly require sacrifice but obedience: 'Obey my voice, and I will be your God.' The heart of religion is obedience. Outward offerings never replace a listening, surrendered heart.

But they would not hear, going 'backward, and not forward,' though God sent His prophets 'daily rising up early.' Their refusal was persistent. God's patient pleading met an obstinate, hardening people.

But they would not hear, going 'backward, and not forward,' though God sent His prophets 'daily rising up early.' Their refusal was persistent. God's patient pleading met an obstinate, hardening people.

But they would not hear, going 'backward, and not forward,' though God sent His prophets 'daily rising up early.' Their refusal was persistent. God's patient pleading met an obstinate, hardening people.
Jeremiah is to speak though they will not hear, and bid Jerusalem cut off her hair in mourning. His message is refused. Faithful preaching must continue even where hearts are closed.

They set idols in God's house and burned their children at Tophet, so it shall be called 'the valley of slaughter.' Their cruelty is monstrous. A people who sacrifice their children to idols have reached the depths of sin.
